title: Using unencrypted RDS DB resources is sensitive
description: Checks if AWS RDS resources are not encrypted

noncompliant.code:
import boto3
client = boto3.client('rds')
response = client.describe_db_instances()

compliant.description: Response contains only encrypted DB instances

why_is_this_an_issue: Unencrypted RDS resources can expose sensitive data
how_to_fix: Encrypt RDS resources using AWS KMS
